exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your real estate investing forward
items: Analyze and compare the cap rates, cash flow potential, and neighborhood trends for 5 specific properties currently for sale in your target market
Create a comprehensive property inspection checklist covering structural, mechanical, and financial red flags to evaluate during property tours
Research and document the exact asking prices, days on market, and recent sale comparables for 10 properties in your target investment area
Calculate and compare the repair costs, after-repair value (ARV), and profit margins for 3 properties that need significant renovations
Create a detailed property valuation spreadsheet comparing 3 different valuation methods (comparable sales, income approach, and cost approach) for a specific investment property
Calculate the 50% Rule operating expense estimates and compare them with actual property expense data from 3 similar rental properties
